name: profile-explorer
description: Root orchestration for the self-contained backend and frontend apps. Not an npm workspace — each app owns its own dependencies; these scripts only coordinate running and testing them together.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend-services/profiles-service && npm install --prefix frontend-application/profiles-app
scripts.up: npm run db:up && concurrently --names backend,frontend --prefix-colors blue,magenta --kill-others-on-fail "npm:dev:backend" "npm:dev:frontend"
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
